"CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:L/UI:P/VC:H/VI:H/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "### Summary
An authenticated commenter could store HTML in row comments that executed as script
when other users hovered over the comment in the expanded form view.

### Details
The comment write paths persisted the raw comment body with no server-side sanitisation;
the expanded-form sidebar then rendered the stored body and fed its `data-tooltip`
attribute to Tippy with `allowHTML: true`. Even when the editor stripped script tags
at write time, attribute-level payloads re-entered the DOM as live HTML on hover.

### Impact
Stored Cross-Site Scripting against any user who views the affected row. Script runs in
the NocoDB origin with the victim's session and can read the auth JWT from
`localStorage`. Authentication and comment permission are required.

### Credit
This issue was reported by [@DavidCarliez](https://github.com/DavidCarliez). It was independently reported by [@Mouhebbenelwafi](https://github.com/Mouhebbenelwafi).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00288, "percentile": 0.2053}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-jf3g-4gwg-4h66", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-05T16:19:22Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jf3g-4gwg-4h66", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-jf3g-4gwg-4h66"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47383"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-05T16:19:22Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/security/advisories/GHSA-jf3g-4gwg-4h66", "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/releases/tag/2026.05.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jf3g-4gwg-4h66"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nocodb/nocodb/security-advisories/GHSA-jf3g-4gwg-4h66", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb", "summary": "NocoDB: Stored Cross-Site Scripting via Row Comments", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T16:19:23Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-jf3g-4gwg-4h66", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.05.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "nocodb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.05.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: NocoDB: Stored Cross-Site Scripting via Row Comments
